Class Manager

java.lang.Object
users.User
users.Employee
users.Manager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Manager extends Employee
Represents a manager responsible for registration workflow, academic reporting, teacher assignment, and administrative sorting and analytics.
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • getManagerType

      public ManagerType getManagerType()

    • canSignAsDean

      public boolean canSignAsDean()
      Checks whether this manager is allowed to sign employee requests as dean.
      Returns:
      true if manager type is DEAN

    • canSignAsRector

      public boolean canSignAsRector()
      Checks whether this manager is allowed to sign employee requests as rector.
      Returns:
      true if manager type is RECTOR

    • approveRegistration

      public void approveRegistration(CourseRegistration registration) throws RegistrationException
      Approves a course registration after validating eligibility, failed-course limits, prerequisites, and course capacity.
      Parameters:
      registration - the registration request to approve
      Throws:
      RegistrationException - if any business rule is violated

    • rejectRegistration

      public void rejectRegistration(CourseRegistration registration, String reason)

      teacher - teacher to assign
      course - target course
